hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try{const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('/tmp/gcf-proxy-stats.json','utf8')); if(d.calls>0){const s=d.pct_saved.toFixed(0); const tb=d.est_tokens_saved; const saved=tb>=1000?(tb/1000).toFixed(1)+'K':tb; console.log(JSON.stringify({notification:'gcf-proxy: '+d.calls+' tool calls rewritten, '+s+'% fewer tokens (~'+saved+' tokens saved)'}))}}catch(e){}"
